basicAttack.name: Trilateral Slash
basicAttack.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 50%~130% of Acheron's ATK to a single enemy.

skill.name: Octobolt Flash
skill.description: Deals Lightning DMG equal to 84%~210% of Acheron's ATK to a single enemy and gains 1 point of Slashed Dream. If the enemy is inflicted with debuff, gains 1 additional point of Slashed Dream.

ultimate.name: Slashed Dream Cries in Red
ultimate.description: When Acheron has 3 points of Slashed Dream, she can use Ultimate. Deals Lightning DMG multiple times to all enemies. Each hit has a 100% base chance to inflict Crimson Knot on enemies. When Crimson Knot is removed, deals additional Lightning DMG equal to a percentage of Acheron's ATK.

talent.name: The Abyss
talent.description: When an ally uses an ability that inflicts debuff on an enemy, Acheron gains 1 point of Slashed Dream. At the start of each wave, gains 1 point of Slashed Dream. When Acheron has 3 points of Slashed Dream, her Ultimate becomes available.

technique.name: Quadrilateral Ascension
technique.description: After using Technique, immediately attacks enemies in a large area. After entering battle, deals Lightning DMG equal to 100% of Acheron's ATK to all enemies and gains 1 point of Slashed Dream.
